zh.lifeSummary: 當Alexander Lindsay 4th Earl of Crawford於1423年出生在蘇格蘭藍納可爾克勞福德時，他的父親David Lindsay 3rd Earl of Crawford18歲，母親Marjory Ogilvy Countess of Crawford23歲。他於1440年與Margaret Dunbar在英國蘇格蘭藍納可爾結婚。他們至少是4個兒子和5個女兒的父母。他於1450年被列為sheriff of aberdeen。他去世於1453年9月13日在蘇格蘭Forfarshire分哈文享年30歲，埋葬在蘇格蘭Forfarshire莫尼吉。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Alexander Lindsay 4th Earl of Crawford于1423年出生在苏格兰藍納可爾克勞福德时，他的父亲David Lindsay 3rd Earl of Crawford18岁，母亲Marjory Ogilvy Countess of Crawford23岁。他于1440年与Margaret Dunbar在英国苏格兰藍納可爾结婚。他们至少是4个儿子和5个女儿的父母。他于1450年被列为sheriff of aberdeen。他去世于1453年9月13日在苏格兰Forfarshire分哈文享年30岁，埋葬在苏格兰Forfarshire莫尼吉。

nameMeanings.name: Lindsay
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Scottish: habitational name from Lindsey in Lincolnshire, England. This is first found in the form Lindissi, apparently a derivative of the British name of Lincoln . To this was later added the Old English element ēg ‘island’, since the place was virtually cut off by the surrounding fenland. The surname was taken to Scotland at an early date and is the name of an important and powerful Scottish family.
Irish: adopted as an equivalent ofvarious Gaelic names (see   Lindsey  ).

variants.name: Linzy
meanings: Altered form of Scottish, Irish, or English   Lindsay   or   Lindsey  . Compare   Lenzy  .

variants.name: Linzey
meanings: English: variant of   Lindsay   or   Lindsey  .

variants.name: Lindsey
meanings: Irish: shortened and Anglicized form of various Gaelic surnames, as for example Ó Loingsigh (see Lynch 1), Mac Giolla Fhionntóg (see McClintock ), and Ó Fhloinn (see Flynn and Lynn ).

variants.name: Lincoln
meanings: English: habitational name from the city of Lincoln, so named from an original British name Lindo- ‘lake’ + Latin colonia ‘settlement, colony’. The place was an important administrative center during the Roman occupation of Britain and in the Middle Ages it was a center for the manufacture of cloth, including the famous ‘Lincoln green’.
African American: adoption of the surname in 1 above, in honor of Abraham Lincoln, the 16th president of the US, who abolished slavery.
History: Abraham Lincoln (1809–65), 16th president of the US, was the son of an illiterate laborer, descended from Samuel Lincoln, who had emigrated from England to MA in 1637.

variants.name: Linsey
meanings: Scottish, Irish, or English: variant of   Lindsay   or   Lindsey  .
Americanized form of German Linse or Swiss German Linsi, see Lins .

nameMeanings.name: Alexander
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: From the Latin form of the Greek name Alexandros, from alexein ‘to defend’ + anēr ‘man, warrior’ (genitive andros). The name became extremely popular in the post-classical period, and was borne by several individuals in the New Testament and some early Christian saints. Its use as a common given name throughout Europe, however, derives largely from the fame of Alexander the Great , King of Macedon ( 356–323 bc ), around whom a large body of popular legend grew up in late antiquity, much of which came to be embodied in the medieval ‘Alexander romances’.

en.lifeSummary: When Alexander Lindsay 4th Earl of Crawford was born in 1423, in Crawford, Lanarkshire, Scotland, his father, David Lindsay 3rd Earl of Crawford, was 18 and his mother, Marjory Ogilvy Countess of Crawford, was 23. He married Margaret Dunbar in 1440, in Lanarkshire, Scotland, United Kingdom. They were the parents of at least 4 sons and 5 daughters. In 1450, at the age of 27, his occupation is listed as sheriff of aberdeen. He died on 13 September 1453, in Finhaven, Forfarshire, Scotland, at the age of 30, and was buried in Monikie, Forfarshire, Scotland.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Alexander Lindsay 4th Earl of Crawford est né en 1423, à Crawford, Lanarkshire, Écosse, son père, David Lindsay 3rd Earl of Crawford, avait 18 ans et sa mère, Marjory Ogilvy Countess of Crawford, avait 23 ans. Il a épousé Margaret Dunbar en 1440, à Lanarkshire, Écosse, Royaume-Uni. Ils ont eu au moins 4 fils et 5 filles. En 1450, à l’âge de 27 ans, sa profession de son indiquée est sheriff of aberdeen. Il est décédé le 13 septembre 1453, à Finhaven, Forfarshire, Écosse, à l’âge de 30 ans, et a été enterré à Monikie, Forfarshire, Écosse.

de.lifeSummary: Als Alexander Lindsay 4th Earl of Crawford 1423 in Crawford, Lanarkshire, Scotland geboren wurde, war sein Vater David Lindsay 3rd Earl of Crawford 18 und seine Mutter Marjory Ogilvy Countess of Crawford 23. Er hat 1440 in Lanarkshire, Schottland, United Kingdom Margaret Dunbar geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 4 Söhne und 5 Töchter. 1450, als er 27 Jahre alt war, war sein Beruf als sheriff of aberdeen aufgeführt. Er starb am 13. September 1453 im Alter von 30 Jahren in Finhaven, Forfarshire, Scotland und wurde in Monikie, Forfarshire, Scotland begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Alexander Lindsay 4th Earl of Crawford è nato il nel 1423 nel Crawford, Lanarkshire, Scotland, il suo padre, David Lindsay 3rd Earl of Crawford, aveva 18 anni e il suo madre, Marjory Ogilvy Countess of Crawford, aveva 23 anni. Lui sposato Margaret Dunbar nel 1440, nel Lanarkshire, Scozia, Regno Unito. Erano genitori di almeno 4 figli e 5 figlie. Nel 1450, all'età di 27 anni, la sua occupazione è indicata come sheriff of aberdeen. Morì il 13 settembre 1453, nel Finhaven, Forfarshire, Scotland, all'età di 30 anni, e fu sepolto a Monikie, Forfarshire, Scotland.

ja.lifeSummary: Alexander Lindsay 4th Earl of Crawfordが1423年にスコットランドラナルクシュアイアクラウフォードで生まれた時，父David Lindsay 3rd Earl of Crawfordは18歳，母Marjory Ogilvy Countess of Crawfordは23歳であった。1440年にイギリススコットランドラナルクシュアイアでMargaret Dunbarと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも4人の息子と5人の娘の親であった。1450年，27歳の時，職業はsheriff of aberdeenと記録されている。彼は1453年9月13日にスコットランドForfarshireフィンヘイベンで30歳で死去し，スコットランドForfarshireモニキにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Alexander Lindsay 4th Earl of Crawford(이)가 1423년 스컷랜드 랜아르크실르 크롤퍼드에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 David Lindsay 3rd Earl of Crawford(은)는 18세였고, 그의 어머니 Marjory Ogilvy Countess of Crawford(은)는 23세였다. 그는 1440년 영국 스코틀랜드 랜아르크실르에서 Margaret Dunbar(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 네 명의 아들과 다섯 명의 딸을 두었다. 1450년, 27세의 나이로 그의 직업은 sheriff of aberdeen이었다. 그는 1453년 9월 13일 스컷랜드 Forfarshire 핑하븐에서 30세의 나이로 사망했으며 스컷랜드 Forfarshire 몬이키에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Alexander Lindsay 4th Earl of Crawford nasceu em 1423, em Crawford, Lanarkshire, Scotland, seu pai, David Lindsay 3rd Earl of Crawford, tinha 18 anos e sua mãe, Marjory Ogilvy Countess of Crawford, tinha 23 anos. Ele casou-se com Margaret Dunbar em 1440, em Lanarkshire, Escócia, United Kingdom. Eles tiveram pelo menos 4 filhos e 5 filhas. Em 1450, com 27 anos, sua profissão aparece como sheriff of aberdeen. Ele faleceu em 13 de setembro de 1453, em Finhaven, Forfarshire, Scotland, com 30 anos, e foi sepultado em Monikie, Forfarshire, Scotland.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Alexander Lindsay 4th Earl of Crawford родился в 1423 г. в местности кравфорд, ланаркшир, Шотландия, его отцу по имени David Lindsay 3rd Earl of Crawford было 18 лет, а матери, которую звали Marjory Ogilvy Countess of Crawford, 23. Он женился на женщине по имени Margaret Dunbar в 1440 г. в местности ланаркшир, Шотландия, Великобритания. У них было по крайней мере 4 сына и 5 дочерей. В 1450 году, в возрасте 27 лет,  он работал по профессии sheriff of aberdeen. Он умер 13 сентября 1453 г. в местности финавен, Forfarshire, Шотландия в возрасте 30 лет и был похоронен в местности моники, Forfarshire, Шотландия.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Alexander Lindsay 4th Earl of Crawford nació en 1423, en Crawford, Lanarkshire, Scotland, su papá, David Lindsay 3rd Earl of Crawford, tenía 18 años y su mamá, Marjory Ogilvy Countess of Crawford, tenía 23 años. Se casó con Margaret Dunbar en 1440, en Lanarkshire, Escocia, Reino Unido. Fueron padres de por lo menos 4 hijos y 5 hijas. En 1450, a la edad de 27 años, su ocupación registrada era sheriff of aberdeen. Murió el 13 de septiembre de 1453, en Finhaven, Forfarshire, Scotland, a la edad de 30 años, y fue sepultado en Monikie, Forfarshire, Scotland.
